description:
Resolve Missing Translations and Default Values in Schedule Timeline Component

Audit and complete all translation strings in the .schedule-timeline component to ensure proper localization and remove hardcoded default values.

Requirements:
- Identify all text content in .schedule-timeline that displays default/untranslated values
- Add missing translation keys to the appropriate locale files
- Replace hardcoded strings with proper translation function calls
- Verify translations exist for all supported languages
- Test the component in different locales to confirm all text displays correctly
- Check for edge cases like pluralization, date/time formatting, and dynamic content
- Ensure fallback behavior is appropriate if translations are unavailable
